name: Meatless Shepherds Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lentils with bay leaf for about 15 minutes or until tender. Drain.
2. Remove the bay leaf. While cooking lentils, pour boiling water over bulgur wheat, garlic powder, and salt. Set aside for 10 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Chop onion and tomatoes; grate cheese.
5. Layer ingredients in the bottom of an oiled 8-inch x 8-inch oven dish in this order: bulgur wheat, lentils, mozzarella cheese, onion, and tomatoes.
6. Mix potato flakes, water, and salt; layer on top of the tomatoes.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
